title: INF-9 LoRA-for-SSM (LoRA mount/unmount for Mamba2 + RWKV)
goal: Implement LoraStackOps for SSM/RWKV variants: LoRA mount/unmount that targets SSM-specific weight tensors (Mamba2 conv1d weights, in_proj, out_proj, A/D parameters; RWKV time-mix and channel-mix weights). PEFT semantics adapted to non-attention architectures.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/ssm_lora.rs implementing LoraStackOps for SSM variants; mamba2.rs + rwkv_v5.rs + rwkv_v6.rs + rwkv_v7.rs forward wrappers to apply LoRA delta; tests.
unblock_conditions: MT-084 transformer-LoRA + MT-085..MT-087 SSM/RWKV base merged.
implementation_notes: Per refinement INF-9 feature_parity_detail: "LoRA mount/unmount for SSMs (LoRA-for-SSM work)". This is research-frontier territory — LoRA-for-SSM is less standardised than LoRA-for-transformer. Target modules per architecture: Mamba2 = `{in_proj, x_proj, dt_proj, out_proj}` (the Linear projections; SSM A/D/conv parameters are NOT good LoRA targets due to scalar/diagonal structure); RWKV v5/v6/v7 = `{ time_mix.*.weight, channel_mix.*.weight }` (similar to attention/mlp split). LoraDescriptor for SSM models requires `architecture: ArchitectureTag` field; mount validates target_modules against the loaded model's architecture. PEFT scaling formula same as transformer: y = base.forward(x) + scaling * strength * (B @ (A @ x)). Per AC-CANDLE-ADAPTER capabilities update after this MT lands: supports_lora=true for SSM variants. Tests (env-gated): mount a small fixture LoRA on Mamba2 (operator-supplied), generate, assert output differs; unmount, output reverts. Note: very few PRODUCTION-quality LoRAs exist for Mamba2/RWKV in 2026 — test MAY fixture-generate a small random LoRA for the smoke test.
risk_if_missed: INF-9 LoRA parity entry missing; operator E-2 acceptance breached.
validator_focus: Architecture tag validation; target-module names per architecture; ArchitectureTag field carried through LoraDescriptor.

what_landed: SSMArchitectureTag enum: Mamba2 / RwkvV5 / RwkvV6 / RwkvV7 (serde snake_case)

MAMBA2_VALID_TARGET_MODULES const: ['in_proj', 'x_proj', 'dt_proj', 'out_proj'] — Linear projections only; SSM A/D/conv parameters intentionally excluded (scalar/diagonal structure, unsuitable PEFT targets)
RWKV_VALID_TARGET_MODULES const: time_mix.* + channel_mix.* Linear-projection family (key/value/receptance/output)
validate_target_modules_for_architecture(): rejects foreign-architecture names, empty lists, whitespace-only entries; accepts exact-name + per-layer-indexed form (module.{N}.weight) for RWKV families
SSM_LORA_PEFT_FORMULA: single-source-of-truth doc string ('y = base.forward(x) + scaling * strength * (B @ (A @ x)); scaling = lora_alpha / rank')
SSM_LORA_MOUNT_DEFERRED_MARKER + ssm_lora_mount_deferred_error(): typed deferral for the actual weight-application path
implementation_record.what_deferred: The mount/unmount path that threads the LoRA delta through each variant's candle forward pass is deferred to a follow-on MT. Today candle-transformers Mamba2 / RWKV model wrappers don't expose hookable weight slots, so applying y = base + scaling * strength * (B @ (A @ x)) per Linear requires either (a) forking candle-transformers, (b) adding a hook layer, or (c) re-implementing the SSM forward path in Handshake. All three are substantial scope; the follow-on MT will pick the path after researching candle's wrapper extensibility. capabilities.supports_lora stays false for SSM variants until that MT lands and flips the flag — same scaffold-then-flip pattern as MT-111's EAGLE-3 upgrade hook.

red_team_coverage.architecture_tag_validation_enforced: 11 validation tests across the 4 architectures plus the empty/whitespace/non-numeric-index edge cases.
red_team_coverage.per_architecture_target_module_name_list: MAMBA2_VALID_TARGET_MODULES + RWKV_VALID_TARGET_MODULES are pub const slices; tests assert per-architecture acceptance + cross-architecture rejection.

edits_made.why_unavoidable: Without the declaration the new ssm_lora.rs module is not part of the candle crate surface. Same defect class as MT-093/109/112 (single-line mod.rs registration).

edits_avoided: lora.rs LoraDescriptor.architecture field addition: the MT-115 contract mentions adding ArchitectureTag to LoraDescriptor, but the public lora.rs surface is not in MT-115 owned_files. Deferred to the follow-on weight-application MT that already needs to touch the mount path.
mamba2.rs / rwkv_v5.rs / rwkv_v6.rs / rwkv_v7.rs forward-wrapper edits: deferred per the what_deferred section. Touching these would require the candle-wrapper hook research first.

CandleRuntime capabilities.supports_lora=true flip: deferred until the weight-application MT proves end-to-end deterministic output divergence on a fixture LoRA. Setting it true here would be dishonest signalling.

minimum_controls: Per-architecture target-module name list explicit (Mamba2 vs RWKV).
